creator: ngrundmann@gmx.de
text:
Hello,

I got again a message about an eclipse port build failure on aarch64:
[package - 133arm64-default][java/eclipse] Failed for eclipse-4.32 in build

Log URL:        https://pkg-status.freebsd.org/ampere3/data/133arm64-default/1f84c1fae602/logs/eclipse-4.32.log
Build URL:      https://pkg-status.freebsd.org/ampere3/build.html?mastername=133arm64-default&build=1f84c1fae602

But I "upgraded" eclipse port to version 4.33 - where the aarch64 build is working.  Would it be possible if someone have a look what is going on?!

Many thanks - Norebrt :-)
